fields.name: Md Mursalatul Islam Pallob
fields.roles: Software Developer,AI/ML Researcher,Cheff,Competitive Programmer,Brazil Supporter,Full-Stack Engineer,Problem Solver,Football Lover
fields.about_text: I'm a passionate Computer Science graduate from Dhaka International University with a strong interest in AI/ML research and full-stack development. From building real-time emotion recognition systems to competing at ICPC, I thrive at the intersection of cutting-edge research and practical engineering. I've led programming clubs, mentored hundreds of competitive programmers, and contributed to research accepted by Taylor & Francis. When I'm not coding, I'm probably thinking about new ideas to bring to life.

fields.title: Speech Emotion Recognition in Real-time
fields.description: Real-time Speech Emotion Recognition system using an LSTM-based deep learning model in Keras. Analyzes live microphone input to identify expressed emotions. Achieves 87% accuracy on RAVDESS & TESS benchmarks with silence detection for robustness.

fields.title: Infant Cry Analysis Web Application
fields.description: Full-stack Django + PostgreSQL web application for multi-class diagnosis of infant distress from cry recordings. Integrates a Spectro-Derivative ML backend to classify cries into pain, hunger, sleepy, and healthy categories with an interactive Bootstrap frontend.

fields.title: Balanced Augmented Spectro-Derivative Ensemble Framework
fields.description: Novel ML framework for multi-class infant distress diagnosis. Extracts and analyzes spectrograms and Spectro-Derivative features from cry audio, then leverages ensemble learning for robust classification. Research published as a preprint targeting IEEE TPAMI.

fields.title: Suicidal Ideation Prediction (NLP)
fields.description: End-to-end NLP pipeline for early detection of suicidal ideation in Bangladeshi adolescents. Compares transformer-based fine-tuning with classical ML baselines on national health survey data. Packaged in reproducible notebooks with ethical/privacy documentation.

fields.title: Digital Cosmos Portfolio
fields.description: Personal portfolio website built with Django, featuring particle canvas animations, dark/light mode toggle, skill chips, typewriter hero, project showcase, publications, achievements, and a responsive glassmorphism design. Deployed on Vercel.

fields.title: Voice Processing with AI
fields.description: Collection of Jupyter notebooks exploring AI-driven voice processing techniques — including feature extraction (MFCCs, spectrograms), emotion analysis, and speech-to-text pipelines. Used as a research sandbox for the Speech Emotion Recognition project.

fields.title: Code Park — DSA & CP Library
fields.description: Comprehensive collection of Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) implementations alongside competitive programming templates. A go-to reference for ICPC preparation covering graphs, trees, dynamic programming, number theory, and more. Has 1 star and 2 forks on GitHub.

fields.title: Django Apps Collection
fields.description: A curated collection of different types of Django applications demonstrating authentication flows, REST APIs, admin customization, ORM patterns, and deployment configurations. Serves as a learning reference for Django best practices.

fields.title: ML Draft — Machine Learning Experiments
fields.description: Curated Jupyter notebooks covering classification, regression, clustering, and time series forecasting across real-world datasets. Explores diverse ML models from linear regression to gradient boosting and neural networks for prediction problems.

fields.title: Library Management System
fields.description: Full-featured desktop Library Management System built with Python and PyQt5. Allows both users and admins to manage books, borrowing records, and member accounts through an intuitive GUI. Has 1 fork on GitHub.

fields.title: Scheduling Algorithm Simulator
fields.description: Interactive web-based simulator for OS scheduling algorithms (FCFS, SJF, Round Robin, Priority Scheduling). Visualizes Gantt charts, computes average waiting time, and turnaround time dynamically in the browser.

fields.title: Shutdown Timer for Windows
fields.description: PyQt5 desktop application that lets users schedule Windows shutdown with a precise timer. Features an intuitive GUI to set, cancel, and re-schedule shutdown. Has 1 star on GitHub and targets power users who need automated shutdown.

fields.title: Mini Projects Collection
fields.description: A growing collection of fun, beginner-to-intermediate Python and C++ mini-projects designed for practice and learning. Topics include games, automation scripts, file utilities, and programming challenges — proving that you can do basically anything with code.

fields.title: Melanoma Detection (ML)
fields.description: Machine learning pipeline for early detection of melanoma from dermoscopic images. Explores CNN architectures and transfer learning for binary skin lesion classification, with a focus on high sensitivity to minimize false negatives.

fields.title: CP Resources Hub
fields.description: A structured repository of competitive programming resources, including problem templates, editorial notes, and C++ snippets for ICPC and IUPC preparation. Covers graph theory, combinatorics, geometry, and string algorithms.

fields.title: Codebox — CP Template Archive
fields.description: Comprehensive algorithm and data structure archive for competitive programming. Contains ready-to-use C++ implementations for competitive programmers — from basic sorting to advanced segment trees and Dijkstra. Has 1 star and 7 forks on GitHub.

fields.title: Microcontroller Projects
fields.description: Hands-on C++ projects for microcontrollers (Arduino/ESP32) — including sensor interfacing, LED control, motor drivers, and IoT prototyping. A practical exploration of embedded systems programming alongside software engineering.

Developed and implemented machine learning models for voice and emotion stress analysis.
Collaborated closely with Flutter, DevOps, and UX/UI engineers to integrate AI-driven features into mobile apps, aligning with project goals.

fields.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering

fields.title: Winner, Programming Competition
fields.description: Won the programming competition organized at Dhaka International University.

fields.title: ICPC 2021 Onsite Contestant
fields.description: Competed in the International Collegiate Programming Contest onsite round.

fields.title: NASA Space Apps Challenge 2023
fields.description: NASA International Space Apps Challenge 2023 — Global Nominee; 1st Runner Up, Barishal Division, Bangladesh.

fields.title: KUET IUPC 2025
fields.description: Participated in the KUET Inter-University Programming Contest.

fields.title: NASA Space Apps Challenge 2025
fields.rank: Champion, Barishal; Global Nominee; Honorable Mention
fields.description: NASA International Space Apps Challenge 2025 — Honorable Mention; Global Nominee; Champion, Barishal Division, Bangladesh.

fields.title: Infant Cry Analysis Using Machine Learning Models and Extended Feature Selection

fields.title: Early Detection of Suicidal Ideation in Bangladeshi Adolescents: A Machine Learning Approach Using National Health Survey Data

fields.title: Balanced Augmented Spectro-Derivative Ensemble Framework for Multi-Class Infant Distress Diagnosis
fields.authors: M. M. I. Pallob and F. B. Orpita
fields.journal: Preprint — Target: IEEE Transactions on Pattern Analysis and Machine Intelligence

fields.bullets:
Oversaw club activities, including organizing coding competitions, workshops, and hackathons.
Collaborated with the executive team to create opportunities for members to advance their programming knowledge.
Organized DIU CSE Fall Fest 2024.

Managed diverse programming contests and authored 59 original competitive programming problems.
Mentored club members in competitive programming, preparing teams for ICPC and IUPC.
Organized seminars and fundraising events to facilitate student branch initiatives.
